mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in real retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term earnings support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the sales trend remains upward.
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS 3-month momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, causing equity risk premia to widen and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by nonnegative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample instances or the average triggered return is not below baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate remains low, investors price future policy tightening and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth exceeds 4% while FEDFUNDS is below 1%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-CPI low-FEDFUNDS condition does not produce lower 20-day returns than other observations in walk-forward tests, or if triggered returns are positive in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving capacity utilization and goods-sector earnings breadth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days during post-shock recoveries.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO growth crossings above zero are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in fewer than 55% of out-of-sample observations or the signal Rank IC is negative over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and future construction-related earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% from its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST drawdowns greater than 10% are not followed by below-baseline 20-day S&P 500 returns, or if the triggered hit rate for negative returns is below 50% in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion combined with falling unemployment signals broad labor-income growth without visible labor slack deterioration, supporting revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-PAYEMS negative-UNRATE condition fails to generate above-baseline 5-day returns or if positive 5-day returns occur in fewer than 52% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the federal funds rate raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during tightening cycles.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS increases of at least 0.25 percentage points are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if average triggered returns exceed baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP and retail sales both accelerate, aggregate demand and corporate revenue expectations improve together, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth is positive and RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above 0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1 and RSAFS acceleration signal does not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than either single proxy alone, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03.
